changes: Launcher mounted directly inside appScreen, so it appears automatically when the authenticated application appears.
Removed timing-dependent wrappers around navTo and renderAll.
Loader registers v17.12.13.3 immediately, before the full SAKURA panel is opened.
Auditoría Pro derives its version from public runtime configuration.
PWA health validates exact cache inbestiga-v17-12-13-3-shell.
New loader/workspace asset filenames bypass stale browser and CDN caches.
